hooks.command: node -e "const f = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH || ''; if (f.includes('overlay-')) { console.error('[DEMO GUARD] Editing a live OBS overlay file: ' + f + '. Verify this will not break the demo before proceeding.'); process.exit(1); }"

node -e "const f = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH || ''; if (f.includes('generated-tokens.css') || (f.includes('public') && f.endsWith('tokens.css'))) { console.error('[TOKEN GUARD] Edit design/tokens.json instead, then run: bun run generate:tokens'); process.exit(1); }"

node -e "const f = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH || ''; if (f.includes('server.js') || f.includes('socket.js')) { console.log('[PORT WATCH] Port-sensitive file edited: ' + f.split(/[\\/]/).pop() + '. Consider running port-consistency-checker if the IP or port changed.'); }"

node -e "const f = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH || ''; if (f.includes('control-panel') && f.endsWith('.svelte')) { const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { const out = execSync('bunx eslint ' + JSON.stringify(f) + ' --max-warnings 0', { cwd: 'C:/Users/Sol/Desktop/PITCH/OVERLAYS/control-panel' }).toString(); if (out.trim()) console.log('[LINT]', out); } catch(e) { const msg = (e.stdout || '').toString() || e.message; console.error('[LINT FAIL]\n' + msg); process.exit(2); } }"
